VE SOLE L/C & P/C OF MINOR CHILD. RESP SHALL HAVE WEEKLY SUPERVISED C/V OF 1 HOUR PER WEEK AT RALLY. COURT DIRECTS PARTIES TO GO TO FCS AND SPEAK WITH
AND FOR MINOR CHILD, HER RESIDENCE, HER PLACE OF WORK AND CHILD'S SCHOOL AND PLACE OF CHILD CARE. FIREARM RESTRICTION/RELINQUISHMENT APPLIES. BASED
C/S=$386/MN COMMENCING 1/1/01. COURT DOES NOT FIND S/S TO BE APPLICABLE AS PARTIES WERE NEVER MARRIED. COURT DENIES PET'S REQUEST FOR $1000 IN
SHE DOES WORK F/T. COURT MAKES AMENDMENTS AND SIGNS ORDER PRESENTED BY PET. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LOIS JONES #3689
